title: Continuation: read-only diagnostic workflow for unit-talk-api-1 restart-history investigation

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Continuation of PR #1259, frozen at the T1 bounce limit (5 CHANGES_REQUIRED verdicts) per PM direction. Same already-reviewed content carried forward on a fresh branch from current main.

verifier.note: Mechanical checks only. Requires t1-approved label and a Griff-authored pm-verdict/v1 APPROVED comment bound to the exact head before merge.

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

runtime_proof.note: This lane adds only a new read-only CI workflow file; no production code path or migration touched. Live smoke run regardless per T1 policy.

acceptance_criteria.captures_image_deployed_sha: PASS -- docker inspect .Image/.Config.Image + /health endpoint version block
acceptance_criteria.captures_docker_daemon_events: PASS -- docker events, generated Unix timestamps
acceptance_criteria.captures_kernel_oom_events: PASS -- journalctl -k, dmesg fallback, explicit command-failure marker

known_gaps: Docker events covers only a 7-day window.
journalctl/dmesg access depends on the deploy user's permissions on the host.
